title: User access report - bad leavers
excerpt: Only Enterprise users can access an audit report. User access reporting should be available (whether for a fee or not I don’t mind) to all administrators. A use case would be to review activity in relation to bad leavers…

posts.author: stevef79 (Steve Forster)
posts.cookedHtml: Only Enterprise users can access an audit report. User access reporting should be available (whether for a fee or not I don’t mind) to all administrators. A use case would be to review activity in relation to bad leavers in the period leading up to their departure. The fact this information can not be sourced is very frustrating.
